business_profile.name: Lumina Hair Studio
business_profile.description: A modern hair salon specializing in contemporary aesthetics, high-volume styling, and custom textured cuts.

services_and_pricing.service: Signature Textured Cuts (Wavy Shag, Soft Wolf Cut)
services_and_pricing.description: Specialty cuts focusing on maximizing volume and movement, tailored to hair type.
Chemical treatment to add permanent wave and volume.
A free 15-minute consultation to discuss hair goals, assess hair type, and review model reference photos.

booking_and_policies.how_to_book: Appointments must be scheduled through the website portal or requested via WhatsApp.
booking_and_policies.cancellation_policy: We require a minimum of 24 hours notice for any cancellations. Late cancellations may incur a fee.
booking_and_policies.preparation: Clients are encouraged to bring model reference photos for textured cuts to ensure the stylist understands the desired aesthetic.

escalation_triggers.action: Apologize for the inconvenience and immediately route to the human Salon Manager.
State that we are stylists, not dermatologists, and escalate. (e.g., questions about severe scalp conditions or hair loss treatments).
Inform the client that prices are fixed base rates, and escalate to a human agent if they persist.
If the AI cannot answer 2 or more questions from the provided SOP, escalate to a human agent.
